title: Girl, 11, dies in the River Thames
summary_full: In a tragic incident, an 11-year-old girl lost her life after she innocently asked to dip her toes in the River Thames. Two weeks of extensive searching led to the recovery of her body. The inquest determined her death was accidental, resulting from immersion in frigid waters, with no signs of foul play among peers. This devastating loss has left her family heartbroken and in mourning.
